name: Permissions Matrix
description: Auto-generated RBAC permission matrix from schemas
details: Displays the full RBAC permission matrix derived from collection schemas. Shows per-collection CRUD permissions for each role, highlights the current user's role, renders team context for team-scoped collections, and provides expandable field details. No schema of its own — reads existing schemas via analyzePermissions().
instructions: Add to App.tsx: import PermissionsPage from './pages/PermissionsPage'
Add navigation link for '/permissions' with a shield icon
patterns: useUser() → current user role for row highlighting
useTeams() → team context for team-scoped collections
Badge component from shared UI kit for permission levels
